allow: Bash(python3 -c "import ipykernel, nbclient; print\('ipykernel', ipykernel.__version__, 'nbclient', nbclient.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import casadi as ca; x=ca.SX.sym\('x',2\); f=0.5*ca.dot\(x,ca.DM\([[20,0],[0,1]]\)@x\); g=ca.gradient\(f,x\); F=ca.Function\('g',[x],[g]\); print\(F\(ca.DM\([1,1]\)\)\)")
